title: Bone Drop│骨頭掉落
description: Some animals drop their bones after death.│部分動物在死亡後會掉落骨頭。
body:
# Function│功能
Pigs, hoglins, cows, mooshrooms, sheep, and **goats (only if [Goat Drops](https://modrinth.com/datapack/goat-drops) is installed)** have a 50% chance of dropping 1 bone, while chickens and rabbits have a 25% chance of dropping 1 bone.│豬、疣豬獸、牛、哞菇、羊、**山羊（僅當安裝了[山羊掉落物](https://modrinth.com/datapack/goat-drops)）** 有50%概率掉落1骨頭，雞、兔有25%概率掉落1骨頭。
